sanskrit:
एतां विभूतिं योगं च मम यो वेत्ति तत्त्वतः।
सोऽविकल्पेन योगेन युज्यते नात्र संशयः॥
transliteration:
etāṃ vibhūtiṃ yogaṃ ca mama yo vetti tattvataḥ |
so’vikalpena yogena yujyate nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
literal_meaning: Whoever knows this splendor and mystic power of Mine in truth, with undivided yoga is united—of this there is no doubt.
contextual_meaning: A mind that clearly perceives the full scope of divine resource, intelligence, and influence naturally drops compartmentalized thinking and moves into single-pointed, uncontaminated engagement.
psychological_state: Consolidated worldview replacing fragmented self-states with one internally coherent narrative of belonging and purpose.
trigger_scenario: A high-performing professional realizes every skill and opportunity traces back to a larger supportive system; the insight dissolves impostor anxiety and shifts effort from proving worth to expressing gratitude.
anchor_text: See God’s full power and let every thought flow into single, seamless service.
